questions.text: Which of the following describes a key bottleneck related to Locking Mechanisms?
options: Inefficient scaling of Shared (S) vs Exclusive (X) locks.
questions.correct_answer: Inefficient scaling of Shared (S) vs Exclusive (X) locks.
questions.explanation: The topic covers how Shared (S) vs Exclusive (X) locks scales under concurrent workloads, which represents the primary bottlenecks.
